ops.body: Remaining criterion 008feb5 (TCC continuity — no notification/FDA re-prompts after upgrade) is verifiable only at the observed live upgrade following the first REAL (non-rc) cc-pool release, which also proves the release-app cask publish. Both tracked in handoff doc 2ff9caf §7. All implementation, gates, and rehearsals are done; the task stays open on this one live criterion by design. Preservation evidence on file: every bundle id, TeamID, App Group, profile specifier, and cask token byte-identical across the flip (Track P preservation inventory).
